Section text:
## 在商业模式、玩法创新、体验纯粹性上的取舍与代价

message.content:
Topics: Strategic trade-offs and associated costs among business models, gameplay innovation, and experience purity.
Questions it can answer: How do commercial objectives, innovative mechanics, and user experience integrity conflict or align? What strategic costs or compromises arise from prioritizing one dimension over the others in product development?
Entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, evidence types: None provided; the input contains only the section heading with no supporting content.
Retrieval focus: Conceptual frameworks, design philosophy, strategic prioritization, and cost-benefit analysis in interactive media or game development contexts.
